mapper.insert:
insert into coupon_claim_record
id,
coupon_id,
user_id,
segment_index,
coupon_token,
status,
order_id,
used_time,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id},
#{couponId},
#{userId},
#{segmentIndex},
#{couponToken},
#{status},
#{orderId},
#{usedTime},
#{createTime},
#{updateTime},
mapper.update: update coupon_claim_record set order_id = #{orderId}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and coupon_token = #{couponToken} and status = 0 and order_id is null

update coupon_claim_record set order_id = #{orderId}, status = 1, used_time = now(), update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and coupon_token = #{couponToken} and status = 0 and order_id is null
update coupon_claim_record set status = 1, used_time = now(), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 0
update coupon_claim_record set status = 0, used_time = null, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 1
update coupon_claim_record set order_id = null, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 0
mapper.select: select id,coupon_id,user_id,segment_index,coupon_token,status,order_id,used_time,create_time,update_time from coupon_claim_record where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1

select c.id as coupon_id, c.name, c.amount, c.min_point, r.segment_index as segment, r.coupon_token, r.status, r.used_time from coupon_claim_record r inner join coupon c on c.id = r.coupon_id where r.order_id = #{orderId} and c.is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select c.id as coupon_id, c.name, c.amount, c.min_point, r.segment_index as segment, r.coupon_token, c.start_time, c.end_time from coupon_claim_record r inner join coupon c on c.id = r.coupon_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = 0 and r.order_id is null and c.is_deleted = 0 and c.end_time >= #{now} order by c.amount desc, c.end_time asc
